mapper.select:
select gve.*, count(tj.id) as task_total, sum(case when tj.task_status = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as task_pending, sum(case when tj.task_status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as task_running, sum(case when tj.task_status = 2 then 1 else 0 end) as task_success, sum(case when tj.task_status = -1 then 1 else 0 end) as task_fail from general_version_edit gve left join task_job tj on gve.id = tj.ref_id
and gve.date = #{genericQueryDTO.configDate}
and gve.file_name like concat('%', #{genericQueryDTO.fileName}, '%')
and gve.goods_name like concat('%', #{genericQueryDTO.productName}, '%')
group by gve.id, date, editor, file_name, new_code, goods_name, new_price, type, remark, gve.created_at, gve.updated_at, operation_remark order by gve.created_at desc
